findings.description: `pattern` attribute is missing from s2 hints. It is a key attribute used in all code selection tags (codeSelect, codeRadioButtons, codeCheckboxes) and is explicitly referenced in both prose ('CODE_PATTERNテーブルとCODE_NAMEテーブルのIDとPATTERNを指定する') and in all JSP code examples as `pattern="PATTERN2"`. Users searching for how to use code tags would likely search for this attribute name.
findings.source_evidence: codeSelectタグ section: 'CODE_PATTERNテーブルとCODE_NAMEテーブルのIDとPATTERNを指定する'; JSP examples: `pattern="PATTERN2"` appears in codeSelect, codeRadioButtons, and codeCheckboxes examples
